rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee declarations in component type scopes for interface behavior; use implementation scopes for assign clauses.
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks to contain AGREE contract elements.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants to define bounds in assumptions and guarantees.
Structure AGREE equations and constants within component type annexes for interface contracts.
Encode boolean logic using standard operators in AGREE expressions.
Avoid referencing AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` in annex blocks.
Component type contracts should reference component ports via visible variables or outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL timing properties directly in AGREE expressions without explicit model exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their scope in AGREE
Model fusion and architecture redesign during repair
